package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	redis "github.com/redis/go-redis/v9"
)

// scenario for redis_no_ttl_on_cache_keys: `rdb.Set(ctx, key, val, 0)` or `rdb.Set(ctx, key, val, redis.KeepTTL)` for cache-like keys without TTL
// fixture polarity: positive; family: library; severity: info.
func scenario427Positive(ctx context.Context, client *redis.Client, key string) error {
	if err := client.Get(ctx, key).Err(); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	return client.Set(ctx, key, "value", 0).Err()
}
